description:
Letter from Yeshuʿa b. al-Ṭabīb ('son of the physician') Ibn al-ʿAmmānī. Dating: late 11th or early 12th century, if this is the father of the well-known poet Aharon b. Yeshuʿa ha-Rofe Ibn al-ʿAmmānī (1109–43). The letter concerns 10 dinars, the sending of other letters, and a legal deed (sheṭar). In my opinion the hand is much later, 13th century (AA)

On verso there are seliḥot.
